channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Ship a demo, not a resume
item.description: Ship a demo, not a resume — 93% of African devs fail because their portfolios don’t prove they can build systems that work under load. Learn how to build a high-signal remote portfolio in 2026.

item.title: Fine-tuning vs prompts: salary gap in 2026
item.description: Fine-tune 7B models 40% cheaper than prompt-only chains — and earn 2.3x more: model selection, LoRA, vLLM, and the deployment mistakes most teams make.

item.title: 50k builds: GitHub Actions vs CircleCI cost
item.description: Slashed CI costs 22% at 50k builds by switching to CircleCI — real numbers, runner queue wait times, and cache storage gotchas most teams miss.

item.title: Ship a portfolio recruiters DM
item.description: Ship a $0 portfolio recruiters DM in 2026 — FastAPI + Redis 7.2 demo beats GitHub streaks and Medium series

item.title: Database pools: CPU cores are a myth
item.description: Cut API latency 55% and CPU 35% by fixing connection pool size — stop using CPU cores. Formula, benchmarks, and config snippets for PostgreSQL 15, Node 20, and Python 3.11.

item.title: Remote salary playbook: $120k script
item.description: Land $120k remote offers: PPP-adjusted spreadsheet counter template that raised my Colombia salary 24% in 5 days

item.title: Rank vector skills for 2026 salaries
item.description: Cut API response time 85%: LLMs vs vector search in 2026 salary data — concrete benchmarks, cost data, and the skill that pays 25% more.

item.title: Choose WebSockets, SSE, or polling wisely
item.description: Cut realtime tech costs 30%: WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling with 2026 benchmarks, memory, and latency numbers you can reproduce today.

item.title: RAG pipelines: the load tests fail
item.description: The goal: cut support tickets by 30% by letting users self-serve answers on loans, fees, and account issues.

item.title: MCP servers: turning AI from magic into machinery
item.description: Cut AI tool latency 65% with MCP servers — connection pooling, streaming responses, and the tool registration mistake that cost teams 2 days of debugging in 2026.

item.title: AI skills worth 30% more salary in 2026
item.description: Discover which AI skills deliver 30% salary bumps in 2026 — vector search vs. prompt tuning with concrete benchmarks, costs, and salary ranges from real job postings.

item.title: RAG in prod: hidden bottlenecks exposed
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 82% — connection leaks, VRAM spikes, and stale indexes exposed. Real numbers from 10k concurrent users on a $342 GPU instance.

item.title: 7 non-traditional paths to shipping real products
item.description: Ship a real product in 10 minutes with Vercel + Next.js — real benchmarks, costs, and the mistakes that cost teams $8k before shipping.

item.title: Land remote jobs: salary cheat sheet for 2026
item.description: Land remote jobs: salary cheat sheet for 2026 — compute a defensible ask in 5 minutes using US market data and your city’s cost-of-living index.

item.title: Stop wasting database connections on CPU cores
item.description: Cut database pool latency 60% by sizing max connections to concurrency, not CPU cores — the mistake 80% of teams made in 2026.

item.title: Build a portfolio that converts remotely
item.description: Build a remote portfolio that converts: use production-grade systems, not demos. Real metrics, cost control, and incident response matter more than GitHub stars. Includes FastAPI, Redis, Locust examples and 2026 hiring insights.

item.title: Production FastAPI vs Django REST in real numbers
item.description: Cut API response time 40 % with FastAPI vs Django REST — real cost, latency, and hiring data for 2026 teams

item.title: Set pool size right or pay the cost
item.description: Cut database connection pool waste 40% with exact settings that work in 2026 — connection validation overhead, pod memory impact, and the async vs sync split most teams miss.

item.title: Get paid 2.3x more: remote salary script
item.description: Get paid 2.3x more: Python script that pulls real-time Levels.fyi data, normalizes for cost-of-living, and outputs a defensible remote salary range in 500 ms. Includes FX caching, health checks, and a counter-offer template.

item.title: AI tools that turned amateurs into pros
item.description: 4 AI dev tools shipping real apps in 2026 — latency deltas, review times, and the one prompt that saved 65% boilerplate.
